reconciliation_note: Manual reconciliation 2026-06-20. data/corpus/normalized/combined_corpus.jsonl is a directory; the live corpus file is full_corpus_v09.jsonl inside it. Unique IDs counted via source_id field (7,121); dataset_id field has only 625 unique values (embedded-slice only).

corpus.id_field_note: source_id is the canonical unique identifier (7,121 unique). dataset_id has 625 unique values — covers the embedded/indexed slice only.

knowledge_graph.note: Full-corpus graph. 7,593 nodes / 31,920 edges as cited in whitepaper.

field_state_adjudicated.status: smoke-test only — adjudication workflow verified but not at benchmark scale

vector_index.note: turbovec index covers 625-record embedded slice; full 7,171-record rebuild needed before expanded-corpus retrieval claims

literature.findings_note: 122,544 findings from 179,450 papers processed (68.2% yield) as of 2026-06-21; extraction still running. Quality not validated — manual audit template at reports/eval/finding_audit_template.csv
